---
title: "Single-Cell Practice"
date: 2026-05-07
categories: [practice, single-cell]
tags: [single-cell]
draft: false
---

## Single-Cell Practice

Reusable notes for practical single-cell analysis decisions.

## Index

| Page | Purpose | Added |
|---|---|---|
| [Technical Factors](technical-factors.qmd) | Technical factors affecting single-cell transcriptomes | 2026-05-19 |
| [Packages](packages.qmd) | Packages and software ecosystem notes | 2026-05-07 |
| [Data Formats](data-formats.qmd) | Common single-cell file formats and loading notes | 2026-05-07 |
| [Sample Organization](sample-organization.qmd) | Relationship between files, samples, and metadata | 2026-05-07 |
| [Seurat Object](seurat-object.qmd) | Inspecting and accessing a Seurat object | 2026-05-07 |
| [Reference](reference.qmd) | Reference resources for annotation and interpretation | 2026-05-08 |
| [Single-Cell Gene Sets](gene-sets.qmd) | Common gene sets used in QC and scoring | 2026-05-07 |
| [Single-Cell QC](qc.qmd) | Basic quality control metrics and filtering decisions | 2026-05-07 |
| [Doublet Detection](doublets.qmd) | Detecting and filtering likely doublets | 2026-05-07 |
| [Single-Cell Normalization](normalization.qmd) | Normalizing raw counts for cell-level comparison | 2026-05-07 |
| [Variable Features](variable-features.qmd) | Selecting highly variable genes for downstream analysis | 2026-05-07 |
| [Cell Cycle Scoring](cell-cycle.qmd) | Scoring and deciding whether to regress cell cycle effects | 2026-05-07 |
| [Single-Cell Scaling](scaling.qmd) | Scaling expression values before PCA | 2026-05-07 |
| [PCA](pca.qmd) | Running and inspecting principal components | 2026-05-07 |
| [Select Principal Components](select-pcs.qmd) | Choosing PCs for downstream graph and visualization steps | 2026-05-08 |
| [SCTransform](sctransform.qmd) | Alternative Seurat preprocessing workflow | 2026-05-07 |
| [Graph Construction](graph-construction.qmd) | Building KNN/SNN graphs for clustering | 2026-05-08 |
| [Clustering](clustering.qmd) | Graph-based clustering and resolution selection | 2026-05-08 |
| [t-SNE](tsne.qmd) | Running and plotting t-SNE embeddings | 2026-05-08 |
| [UMAP](umap.qmd) | Running and plotting UMAP embeddings | 2026-05-08 |
| [Markers](markers.qmd) | Cluster markers, condition markers, and marker visualization | 2026-05-08 |
| [Cell Annotation](cell-annotation.qmd) | Assigning and reviewing cell type labels | 2026-05-08 |
| [Cell Composition](cell-composition.qmd) | Cell type counts and sample-level proportions | 2026-05-08 |
| [Module Score](module-score.qmd) | Gene set and signature scoring in cells | 2026-05-08 |
